title: How Claude Code's Creator ACTUALLY Automates his work
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Boris Cherny, creator of Claude Code, uses Claude Skills to automate work. The breakdown covers the decision framework for creating skills, three strategies for maximizing skill value through agents, hooks, and loops, and highlights two underutilized powerful features in Claude Code.
